message:
feat(ffs-core): device-based path resolution (bd-2bu)

Add OpenFs::resolve_path() that walks directory inodes from root to
resolve absolute paths like /a/b/c. Uses lookup_name() for each
component with proper error handling: NotFound for missing names,
NotDirectory for non-directory intermediates, Format for relative paths.

5 new tests: root, file, not-found, not-directory, relative-rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
